# update-supabase-functions-sync-flow
Description: Update a Supabase functions sync flow to include environment variable build and container restart steps.
Source: project
1. Ensure all required secrets (e.g., `BILLHUB_*`) are added to your secret management system.
2. Update the `supabase-functions-sync` flow to include steps for building environment variables and restarting the functions container.
3. Manually trigger the updated sync flow with the following parameters:
    *   `app_slug`: `bill-payment-hub`
    *   `repo_url`: `https://gitlab.your-domain.com/code-labz/bill-payment-hub`
    *   `branch`: `main`
4. Verify that the flow successfully syncs all functions, builds the environment variables, restarts the functions container, and registers everything in the registry.
